case_title: THE ARLINGTON RESIDENCE vs. VAESAU, VALILI et al

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ARLINGTON RESIDENCE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-13-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 318 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-18-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE ALEX SALDAMANDO, PRESIDING. VALERIE PAPALE,CSR, GAIL PEERLESS, CLERK. CHARLES T. RAMSEY, ESQUIRE APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. VALILI VAESAU, DEFENDANT, APPEARING IN PRO PER. PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATED JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION OF 480 ELLIS ST, #232, SAN FRANCISCO. SAID JUDGMENT IS STAYED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PAY THE FOLLOWING: $450 IN LEGAL FEES AND COSTS. PAY $420 TO MGMT OF APT. COMPLEX BY 4PM ON SEPT. 15, 2000. DEFENDANT TO PAY BACK RENT FOR THE MONTHS OF JUNE, JULY, AUGUST AND SEPT. IN THE AMOUNT OF $1680, PAYMENTS OF $322.00 WILL COMMENCE ON 10-15-00 AND CONTINUE THROUGH 2-15-01. DEFENDANT TO PAY MONTHLY RENT ON TIME. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT OF PREMISES. IF DEFT MEETS ALL OBLIGA- TIONS, DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. IF DEFT DOES NOT MEET OGLI- GATION, PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK AN EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR A WRIT OF EXECUTION. SEPTEMBE 18, 2000 TRIAL DATE IS VACATED.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 318

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAESAU, VALILI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 480 ELLIS ST. #232 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,610.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-01-2001, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
